Healthy.recommendation: Plant appears healthy. Maintain current care practices and monitor regularly.

Leaf Spot.recommendation: Apply a copper-based fungicide and improve air circulation around the crop canopy.

Powdery Mildew.recommendation: Remove heavily infected leaves and treat early in the morning before heat rises.

Blight.recommendation: Isolate affected plants, remove infected tissue, and treat with a protective fungicide.

Rust.recommendation: Avoid overhead watering and treat the leaf surface thoroughly.

Anthracnose.recommendation: Remove diseased fruit and reduce humidity around the plant.

Fruit Rot.recommendation: Remove infected fruit immediately and improve drainage.
